overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a first-person driving sequence through a heavy rainstorm at night. The player transitions from a paved multi-lane highway into the desert Badlands, driving on dirt terrain before arriving at an abandoned desert settlement with derelict buildings.

events.description: driving over pedestrian crosswalk markings painted on the wet asphalt
accelerating to high speed on the straight highway section

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on the rain-slicked highway, navigating through heavy rain and fog with street lights illuminating the road

entered.detail: concrete divider barrier running along the right side of the highway
wet black asphalt with visible rain and reflections
double yellow lines marking the center of the highway
tall street lights illuminating the highway at regular intervals
futuristic car dashboard with green illuminated displays and steering wheel
palm trees visible in the distance along the roadside

segments.scene_description: Driving on a multi-lane highway during a heavy night rainstorm. The wet asphalt reflects the street lights as the vehicle navigates through the foggy conditions, passing crosswalk markings and palm trees along the roadside.

events.description: vehicle leaves paved highway and transitions onto unpaved desert dirt terrain
accelerating to high speed on the open dirt road through the desert

agents.ego_description: driving off-road through the desert Badlands, kicking up mud and dirt while maintaining high speed in the heavy rain

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and mud road with tire tracks through the desert
sparse desert bushes and dry plants lining the dirt road
wooden power poles running parallel to the dirt road
scattered rocks and boulders in the desert landscape

segments.scene_description: The vehicle has left the paved highway and is now speeding through the desert Badlands on a dirt road. Wooden utility poles line the left side while sparse desert vegetation and rocks dot the landscape, all visible through the heavy rain and fog.

events.description: distant lights from abandoned buildings become visible through the rain and fog
slowing down significantly as approaching the abandoned buildings

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching an abandoned desert settlement, navigating around derelict vehicles and ruins

entered.detail: derelict desert buildings with lit windows and porches
rusted abandoned cars and trucks scattered near the buildings
metal fencing surrounding the abandoned property
illuminated lights on the building porches cutting through the darkness

segments.scene_description: Approaching an abandoned desert settlement through the heavy rain. Derelict buildings with porch lights become visible on the left, while rusted vehicle wrecks and chain-link fences line the right side of the rough dirt path.

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop near the abandoned buildings
camera pans around to survey the abandoned settlement and vehicle interior

agents.ego_description: stopped vehicle, looking around the abandoned desert buildings and surveying the derelict surroundings from the driver's seat

entered.detail: wooden porch with roof and hanging lights on the main building
interior ceiling and side windows of the vehicle becoming visible as camera pans
dilapidated structures and debris around the settlement

segments.scene_description: The vehicle has stopped at the abandoned desert settlement. The camera pans around to reveal the building porches, derelict vehicles, and ruins surrounding the area, while rain continues to pour down on the dirt ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked urban highway into the desolate ruins of a desert settlement. It begins by navigating a multi-lane highway during a heavy night rainstorm, where wet asphalt reflects street lights amidst fog and roadside palm trees. As the vehicle leaves the pavement, the scene shifts to the desert Badlands, speeding along a dirt road lined with wooden utility poles and sparse vegetation. The path then leads toward an abandoned settlement, where derelict buildings with dim porch lights and rusted vehicle wrecks emerge through the downpour. Finally, the vehicle comes to a halt, and the camera pans across the surrounding ruins and chain-link fences as rain continues to pour onto the dirt ground.
